## ✅ Checklist Before Requesting Review

- [ ] Code compiles/builds successfully
- [ ] CI pipeline passes
- [ ] Issue is linked
- [ ] Acceptance criteria satisfied
- [ ] Documentation updated (if required)
- [ ] No debug code left behind
- [ ] No secrets committed
